titleStmt.title: SII 9.712: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 712. (A.R. No. 78-A of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE WEST SIDE OF THE RUINED SHRINE CLOSE TO THE MANDAPA IN THE KALLESVARA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1131, Śukla, Chaitra, Paurṇamāse, Bṛihaspativāra, corresponding to A.D. 1209 March 11, Thursday. It records the consecration of the god Suparṇavēgāmṛitēśvaradēva and the grant of some wet land for the service of the god bp Suparṇavēgāmṛita-Paṭṭavardhana-Dīkshita-Sōmayājya as well as the consecration of the god Mallikārjunadēva and the grant of some land for the service of this god by a certain Chāmaṇṇa, son of Hayaṇṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatu hariścaṁdradattiya mahāgrahāraṁ bāḷguḷiyūroḍeyapramukhavaśēṣa
mahājanamayvadiṁbara saṁnidhānadalu bharadvājagōtrada beṇṇaya nārāyaṇaṣaṇaṁgi yara pu
traṁ suparṇṇavēgāmaitapaṭṭavarddhanadīkṣita sōmayājyaru śakavarṣada 1131 śuklasaṁvatsara caitrada pau
rṇṇamāse brihaspativāradaṁdu tāvu pratiṣThe māḍida suparṇṇavēgāmaitēśvaradēvara (ra)ṁgabhōga raṁgabhōgakke(ṁ)
ndu śrīkalidēvara mānyadalu kūḍi biṭṭa karppanakaṭṭiya gadde kamma 150 mattavā beṇṇaya hayaṇṇaga
ḷa putraṁ cāmaṇṇaṁ tāṁ pratiṣṭemāḍida śrīmallikārjjunadēvaraṁgabhōga raṁgabhōgakkeṁdayvadiṁ
barige pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu kalidēvara mānyadōpādiyāgi māḍi biṭṭa maṁḍavāḷada tōṭagaṭṭu he
ddāri paḍuvalu baḍagalu haḷḷa mūṟōṇi teṁkalu huṇiseya kāḷana mataṁgana hurigaṭṭeya
gaṭṭu kamma 150 mattaṁ bhaṁḍagaṭṭadahaḷḷadiṁ teṁka kamma 60 manalliya grāsanakke biṭṭaru yiṁtī dharmmama
nayvadiṁbaru pratipāḷisuvaru . kurukeya baḷiya keṁgāḍu suparṇṇa mattu
limādiya keṟeyalu
Digital edition of SII 9.712 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
